gist.headline: Pruning the greenhouse
gist.blurb: We did a little weeding in the documentation and removed a broken link to an old Python SDK. Keeping the garden paths clear and 404-free!
gist.summary: Removed a broken link to an invalid Python SDK repository from the apps directory and main documentation.
gist.impact: Developers browsing the apps page will no longer be misdirected to a 404 page.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee doing some light gardening, removing a dead pixelated plant or broken signpost (representing the dead link) from a vibrant digital greenhouse.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny gardener's hat, pulling a small withered weed from a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot in a digital greenhouse. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
